mapper.select:
SELECT source.user_id FROM ( SELECT user_id, MAX(updated_at) AS latest_source_updated_at FROM ( SELECT e.user_id, e.updated_at FROM tb_diary_event e INNER JOIN tb_diary d ON d.diary_id = e.diary_id AND d.user_id = e.user_id AND d.is_deleted = 0 WHERE e.is_active = 1 AND d.diary_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 89 DAY) AND CURRENT_DATE
UNION ALL
SELECT p.user_id, p.updated_at FROM tb_user_trait_profile p WHERE p.is_active = 1 ) raw_source GROUP BY user_id ) source LEFT JOIN tb_user_memory_snapshot snapshot ON snapshot.user_id = source.user_id AND snapshot.is_active = 1 WHERE snapshot.snapshot_id IS NULL OR source.latest_source_updated_at > snapshot.generated_at ORDER BY source.user_id

SELECT e.event_id, e.diary_id, d.diary_date, e.event_type, e.event_title, e.event_summary, e.emotion, e.emotion_intensity, e.confidence, e.evidence_text, e.people_json, e.places_json, e.activities_json, e.relationship_json, e.causality_json, e.pattern_candidate_json, e.updated_at FROM tb_diary_event e INNER JOIN tb_diary d ON d.diary_id = e.diary_id AND d.user_id = e.user_id AND d.is_deleted = 0 WHERE e.user_id = #{userId} AND e.is_active = 1 AND d.diary_date BETWEEN #{sourceFromDate} AND #{sourceToDate} ORDER BY d.diary_date DESC, e.event_id DESC

SELECT p.profile_id, p.trait_key, t.trait_category, t.trait_name, p.long_term_score, p.recent_score, p.confidence, p.evidence_count, p.calculated_date, p.summary_text, p.updated_at FROM tb_user_trait_profile p LEFT JOIN tb_mst_trait_definition t ON t.trait_key = p.trait_key WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.is_active = 1 ORDER BY t.trait_category, t.sort_seq, p.trait_key
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user_memory_snapshot SET is_active = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user_memory_snapshot ( user_id, snapshot_version, is_active, summary_text, recurring_themes_json, important_people_json, stress_factors_json, recovery_factors_json, trait_summary_json, source_from_date, source_to_date, source_json, generated_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{snapshotVersion}, 1, #{summaryText}, #{recurringThemesJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{importantPeopleJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{stressFactorsJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{recoveryFactorsJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{traitSummaryJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{sourceFromDate}, #{sourceToDate}, #{sourceJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW() )
